items.title_en: Whipsaw market actions leaves traders looking for direction. The 'fear gauge' might offer a clue
items.title_zh: 市场的波动让交易者寻找方向。 “恐惧量表”可能提供线索
items.desc_en: Volatility in the S&P 500 as measured by the Cboe VIX Index ended down on Tuesday, despite a brief pop to 19.01, the highest since April 28.
items.desc_zh: 以芝加哥期权交易所 VIX 指数衡量的标准普尔 500 指数波动性周二收盘下跌，尽管短暂上涨至 19.01，为 4 月 28 日以来的最高水平。

items.title_en: JPMorgan clients are 'full-blown bearish.' But the bank is telling them to calm down
items.title_zh: 摩根大通的客户“完全看空”。但银行告诉他们要冷静
items.desc_en: JPMorgan’s clients are really worried about the stock market right now.
items.desc_zh: 摩根大通的客户现在真的很担心股市。

items.title_en: Trump arrives in Beijing with CEOs ahead of Xi meetings
items.title_zh: 特朗普在习近平会议前与首席执行官抵达北京
items.desc_en: The president landed in the Chinese capital for a highly anticipated summit with Xi Jinping.
items.desc_zh: 总统抵达中国首都，与习近平举行备受期待的峰会。

items.title_en: Amazon ditches Rufus chatbot, launches Alexa shopping agent in AI strategy pivot
items.title_zh: 亚马逊放弃 Rufus 聊天机器人，推出 Alexa 购物代理以人工智能战略为支点
items.desc_en: Amazon introduced Alexa for Shopping, an e-commerce bot that can answer queries and take actions on behalf of users
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊推出了 Alexa for Shopping，这是一种电子商务机器人，可以代表用户回答查询并采取行动

items.title_en: Philippine Senate in lockdown after gunshots fired
items.title_zh: 菲律宾参议院因枪击事件被封锁
items.desc_en: Police commandos entered the building where a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court had sought refuge.
items.desc_zh: 警察突击队进入了一名被国际刑事法院通缉的参议员寻求庇护的大楼。

items.title_en: What to know as Trump visits Xi in China
items.title_zh: 特朗普访华习近平时需要了解什么
items.desc_en: Trump has landed in Beijing for the first visit by a US leader since his own in 2017.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普抵达北京，这是自2017年以来美国领导人首次访问北京。

items.title_en: Nvidia's Jensen Huang bets on this British startup to build 'next frontier' of AI
items.title_zh: 英伟达 (Nvidia) 的黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 押注于这家英国初创公司，打造人工智能的“下一个前沿”
items.desc_en: Months-old Ineffable Intelligence announced a record $1.1 billion seed round in April.
items.desc_zh: 几个月前成立的 Ineffable Intelligence 于 4 月份宣布获得创纪录的 11 亿美元种子轮融资。

items.title_en: Hyperscalers' AI buildout will require massive amounts of energy. Two under-the-radar stocks will benefit
items.title_zh: 超大规模企业的人工智能建设将需要大量能源。两只不为人知的股票将受益
items.desc_en: The magnitude of the A.I. capital spending boom is historic and the dollar values are staggering.
items.desc_zh: 人工智能的规模资本支出热潮是历史性的，美元价值令人震惊。

items.title_zh: 4月份批发通胀同比上涨6%，创四年来最大增幅

items.desc_zh: 根据道琼斯共识，预计 4 月份生产者价格指数将上涨 0.5%。

items.title_en: More than 1,000 passengers held on cruise in France after gastroenteritis outbreak
items.title_zh: 法国邮轮爆发肠胃炎 逾千名乘客滞留
items.desc_en: The ship, which set sail from Belfast on Friday, is at port in Bordeaux after 49 people fell ill from gastroenteritis.
items.desc_zh: 这艘船于周五从贝尔法斯特起航，目前停泊在波尔多港口，此前有 49 人患有肠胃炎。

items.title_en: Walmart cuts 1,000 roles to simplify operations, Reuters reports
items.title_zh: 路透社报道，沃尔玛裁员 1,000 人以简化运营
items.desc_en: Under new CEO John Furner ​and a ​reshaped leadership team, the ​retailer is doubling down on a tech-focused strategy.
items.desc_zh: 在新任首席执行官约翰·弗纳（John Furner）和重组的领导团队的领导下，这家零售商正在加倍努力实施以技术为中心的战略。

items.title_en: Climbers clear path to Everest summit past giant chunk of ice
items.title_zh: 登山者通过巨大的冰块开辟了通往珠穆朗玛峰顶峰的道路
items.desc_en: Nearly 1,000 climbers will attempt to scale the peak in coming weeks and this has raised safety concerns.
items.desc_zh: 近 1,000 名登山者将在未来几周内尝试攀登珠峰，这引发了安全担忧。

items.title_en: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
items.title_zh: 自杀论坛因未屏蔽英国用户而被罚款 95 万英镑
items.desc_en: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，该论坛在保护英国用户方面做得不够，但批评者指责 Ofcom 行动太慢。

items.title_en: Mortgage rates move to highest level in 5 weeks, but homebuyers shake it off
items.title_zh: 抵押贷款利率升至五周以来最高水平，但购房者摆脱了困境
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates continued to climb higher, but stronger homebuyer demand helped to keep mortgage applications in positive territory.
items.desc_zh: 抵押贷款利率继续攀升，但强劲的购房者需求有助于使抵押贷款申请保持在正值区间。

items.title_en: Shrinking Milka chocolate bar tricked consumers, says German court
items.title_zh: 德国法院称，缩小的米尔卡巧克力棒欺骗了消费者
items.desc_en: A court in Bremen has found the manufacturer of the classic Alpine Milk chocolate bar guilty of "shrinkflation".

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.title_en: Alibaba's core profit plunges 84% even as AI and cloud growth accelerate
items.title_zh: 尽管人工智能和云计算加速增长，阿里巴巴核心利润仍暴跌84%
items.desc_en: Alibaba on Wednesday said its core profitability plunged in the March quarter amid heavy investments in tech and e-commerce.
items.desc_zh: 阿里巴巴周三表示，由于对科技和电子商务的大量投资，其核心盈利能力在三月份季度大幅下降。

items.desc_en: Air India faces a leadership vacuum and mounting financial losses as it struggles to recover from the crash.
items.desc_zh: 印度航空在努力从事故中恢复的过程中面临着领导真空和不断增加的财务损失。

items.title_en: Starmer’s Peril Sets Up Stranger-Than-Ever UK King’s Speech - Bloomberg.com
items.title_zh: 斯塔默的危险让英国国王的演讲变得前所未有的陌生 - Bloomberg.com
items.desc_en: Starmer’s Peril Sets Up Stranger-Than-Ever UK King’s Speech  Bloomberg.comStarmer sets out changes to education, health and courts in king’s speech  The GuardianBritain’s embattled prime minister is s
items.desc_zh: 斯塔默的危险让英国变得前所未有的陌生 国王的演讲 Bloomberg.com 斯塔默在国王的演讲中提出了对教育、健康和法院的改革 《卫报》 英国四面楚歌的首相感到不安

items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？

items.title_en: Sam Altman: Elon Musk wanted control of OpenAI even after death
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼：埃隆·马斯克死后仍想控制 OpenAI
items.desc_en: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
items.desc_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼表示，埃隆·马斯克曾多次尝试完全控制 OpenAI，目前他正在起诉 OpenAI。

items.title_en: Lebanon says two paramedics among 10 killed in Israeli strikes
items.title_zh: 黎巴嫩称以色列空袭造成 10 人死亡，其中 2 名护理人员
items.desc_en: Lebanon's health ministry says the paramedics were carrying out a rescue mission in Nabatieh in response to an earlier attack that killed one person.
items.desc_zh: 黎巴嫩卫生部表示，医护人员正在纳巴提耶执行救援任务，以应对早些时候造成一人死亡的袭击事件。

items.title_en: Zelensky's ex-chief of staff in court as Ukraine corruption probe escalates
items.title_zh: 乌克兰腐败调查升级，泽伦斯基前幕僚长出庭
items.desc_en: Andriy Yermak was named by Ukraine's two anti-corruption agencies as a suspect in a money-laundering scheme.
items.desc_zh: 安德烈·叶尔马克 (Andriy Yermak) 被乌克兰两个反腐败机构列为洗钱计划的嫌疑人。

items.desc_zh: 专为 Gemini Intelligence 设计的新型笔记本电脑

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。

items.title_en: Texas accuses Netflix of spying on users, including children
items.title_zh: 德克萨斯州指控 Netflix 监视用户，包括儿童
items.desc_en: The lawsuit comes amid increased scrutiny over platform features like auto-play that deliver endless content to users.
items.desc_zh: 此次诉讼发生之际，人们对自动播放等向用户提供无尽内容的平台功能进行了越来越严格的审查。

items.title_en: No sign of larger hantavirus outbreak, says UN health agency
items.title_zh: 联合国卫生机构称，没有迹象表明存在更大规模的汉坦病毒爆发
items.desc_en: The situation could still change and there might be more confirmed cases, warns the head of the World Health Organization.
items.desc_zh: 世界卫生组织负责人警告说，情况仍可能发生变化，可能会出现更多确诊病例。

items.desc_zh: 木工车间已经被技术改造，使工具更安全、更精确。

items.title_zh: TikTok 在英国推出 3.99 英镑无广告订阅服务
items.desc_en: Those who don't subscribe will be able to use the platform for free - but be shown personalised ads by default.
items.desc_zh: 那些不订阅的人将能够免费使用该平台 - 但默认情况下会显示个性化广告。

items.title_en: International cyber attack disrupts swathe of universities and schools
items.title_zh: 国际网络攻击扰乱了大片大学和学校
items.desc_en: A hacking group breached the academic software Canvas, used by thousands of schools and universities across the globe.
items.desc_zh: 一个黑客组织入侵了全球数千所学校和大学使用的学术软件 Canvas。

items.title_en: TikTok rows back AI video descriptions in US after absurd errors
items.title_zh: TikTok 在美国因出现荒谬错误而收回人工智能视频描述
items.desc_en: While only rolled out to some TikTok users, the feature's bizarre AI-generated descriptions were shared widely.
items.desc_zh: 虽然仅向部分 TikTok 用户推出，但该功能由人工智能生成的奇异描述却被广泛分享。

items.title_en: Instagram privacy tech is turned off today- what does this mean for your DMs?
items.title_zh: Instagram 隐私技术今天关闭 - 这对您的私信意味着什么？
items.desc_en: The platform said it would remove end-to-end encrypted messages, a major U‑turn by parent company Meta.
items.desc_zh: 该平台表示将删除端到端加密消息，这是母公司 Meta 的一个重大转变。

items.title_en: How sunburn inspired a new way to store energy
items.title_zh: 晒伤如何激发了一种储存能量的新方法
items.desc_en: Molecules that can capture heat could be a useful technology to decarbonise heating.
items.desc_zh: 能够捕获热量的分子可能是一种有用的供暖脱碳技术。
